description_long: This shotgun features a robust, metallic barrel with a dark, weathered finish and a slightly flared muzzle, giving it a rugged, utilitarian appearance. The frame is substantial, with a large, cylindrical chamber and a visible hammer mechanism at the rear. The grip is crafted from dark, polished wood, ergonomically shaped and adorned with a small metallic charm hanging from its base. The trigger guard is rounded and moderately sized, providing ample space for finger placement. The overall design is reminiscent of a hybrid between a revolver and a shotgun, with a unique, almost steampunk aesthetic. Subtle metallic accents and wear marks suggest frequent use, while the combination of wood and metal materials gives it a classic yet formidable look.
description: A rugged, metallic shotgun with a dark, weathered barrel and a polished wooden grip, featuring a large cylindrical chamber and a distinctive, rounded trigger guard.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, highlighting the dark metal barrel, large chamber, wooden grip, and hanging charm.
description_view_1: Front-on view emphasizing the circular barrel opening and the top of the wooden grip, with the chamber and barrel alignment clearly visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the hammer mechanism, trigger guard, and the curvature of the wooden grip, mirroring the details seen in view 0.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the grip and the end of the chamber, with the hammer and trigger guard partially visible.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, long and cylindrical with a slightly flared muzzle and no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with a smooth, continuous curve and no finger grooves or reinforcement
